siteMetadata.title: 林中路
siteMetadata.subtitle: 谁终将声震人间，必长久深自缄默；谁终将点燃闪电，必长久如云漂泊。

frontmatter.title: 编译器设计：引言
frontmatter.description: Compilers are percieved to be magical artifacts, carefully crafted by the wizards, and unfathomable by the mere mortals.

frontmatter.title: 浅谈编程中的抽象
frontmatter.description: 前段时间和@wwj718关于抽象这一块聊了许多，我们都认为抽象对于软件开发很重要，今天我便来简单聊一聊编程中的抽象。

frontmatter.title: From FP to OOP, a.k.a Patterns
frontmatter.description: 关于函数式与面向对象的争议自“古”有之，两种范式有各自擅长的领域，本文的目的是使通过函数式语言学会编程的人可以很好的将自己的编程思维transfer到面向对象语言上。

frontmatter.title: The Expression Problem Revisited
frontmatter.description: The Expression Problem is a new name for an old problem. The goal is to define a datatype by cases, where one can add new cases to the datatype and new functions over the datatype, without recompiling existing code, and while retaining static type safety (e.g., no casts).
